meta.title: Sri Lanka: A Growing Hub in the Indo-Pacific
meta.description: Ambassador Husain Haqqani and Ambassador Prasad Kariyawasam of Sri Lanka will discuss Sri Lanka's growing economic prominence in the Indo-Pacific.
